name: Pylos
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Pylos (David G. Royffe, Gigamic): build a four-level pyramid on a 4x4 base from a shared pool of 30 spheres. Place from your reserve or raise one of your own free spheres up a level; complete a 2x2 square of your colour and take back 1 or 2 of your free spheres. First to land a sphere on the apex wins.
